title: hyptis angulosa
intro: Hyptis angulosa, also known as Brazilian hyptis or Brazilian lemon balm, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hyptis angulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Hyptis angulosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
